reviewRepair.repairedFinding: P2 adapter collection lookups now resolve only own enumerable data descriptors; inherited Object.prototype IDs cannot become source/target records.

independentReview.evidence: Independent review reran 9/9, typecheck, strict lint and diff-check; accepted own-only special-ID semantics and revalidated region.create, update/remove, undo, selection, persistence and hostile contracts.

mission.outcome: Manual create, move, resize and delete Region mutations use canonical project commands with one undo boundary and durable reload semantics.
mission.acceptance: Source-space integer positive in-bounds geometry, stable Region identity, exact own-data boundaries, one command/undo, selection resilience, no-op stability, missing-target and hostile containment, ProjectStore/history/reload, limits and determinism.

coreSeam.need: Canonical project exposed region.update/remove/reorder and recipe-bound regions.commitRecipe, but no recipe-free manual create command.
coreSeam.approval: Parent approved the minimal region.create seam before core mutation.
invariants: exact own enumerable data-only Region payload
canonical Region keys and required identity/source/bounds/timestamps
safe-integer non-negative x/y and positive width/height
minimal direct impact and inverse region.remove/reject
coreSeam.recipePolicy: No ProcessingRecipe or provenance is invented for a manual Region.

intentMapping.move: region.update bounds patch preserving width/height and Region identity
intentMapping.delete: region.remove with reject policy and canonical impact analysis

implementation.noOp: Unchanged move/resize returns null before ProjectStore dispatch, preserving revision and history.

cases: create at explicit order index with direct impact and exact undo
duplicate identity, missing source, invalid order and out-of-source bounds
move/resize preserve identity and selected Region
geometry no-op preserves store revision and history
successful selected delete clears selection and undo restores Region/selection
referenced delete fails with REFERENCE_BLOCKED and preserves selection/project
missing target, fractional/zero/out-of-source geometry and invalid atIndex
hostile project/intent getters and throwing/revoked proxies are redacted
inherited toString/constructor/__proto__ source IDs reject as missing
inherited toString/constructor/__proto__ Region IDs reject for delete/move/resize without producing a command
exact own canonical Asset/Region records named toString/constructor/__proto__ remain usable
4096 Region limit rejects the next create deterministically

verification.command: bunx vitest run 13 region/project/store/history/codec/wand contract files

verification.details: exit 0 after repairing both attributed test diagnostics

verification.command: bunx oxlint core/project/commands.ts core/project/applyCommand.ts core/project/impact.ts features/slice/irregular/manualRegionCommands.ts features/slice/irregular/index.ts tests/contract/regionCreateCommand.test.ts tests/contract/manualRegionCommands.test.ts
JSON parse, scoped tracked/untracked diff-check and forbidden recipe/provenance scan
verification.details: artifact parsed; scoped diff-check passed; manual adapter contains no recipe/provenance path or direct dynamic assets/regions lookup
S1-03 explicitly has no UI; runtime proof uses canonical reducer, ProjectStore/history and ProjectCodec.

pressure.independentReview: accepted; first review rejected inherited Object.prototype collection lookups, and the second review accepted descriptor-own resolution plus inherited/own special-ID matrix with P0-P3=0
pressure.strongestObjection: Delete could damage selection when graph references block removal, or geometry editing could replace Region identity.
pressure.repair: Added referenced-delete preservation proof and successful selected-delete undo proof; source inspection/test asserts move and resize emit only region.update.
pressure.remainingRisk: The adapter clones and validates the complete canonical project per committed mutation; S1-04 should call it once per completed gesture, not on every pointermove.

preserved: wand implementation beyond one public barrel export
